creator: tatsuki_makino@hotmail.com
text:
This is just a little bit of information.

I have also used FETCH_DEPENDS=ca_root_nss>=0:security/ca_root_nss lines in print/epson-inkjet-printer-escpr.
Sometimes due to a problem with https server on the master site, distfile cannot be downloaded if it is not installed.

And it seems to me that the problem is less likely to occur these days, has something changed on the base side?
